company.name: GGI Solutions
company.core_positioning: GGI Solutions builds simple digital systems that help people move forward.
company.expanded_positioning: GGI Solutions builds interactive websites, event pages, messaging worlds, follow-up systems, smart qualifiers, and growth development tools for organizations that want people to feel seen, guided, and supported.
company.founder_heart: Developing people and helping them become who God designed them to be.
company.internal_mission: GGI Solutions exists to understand how people are wired and build systems that help them grow, connect, and move toward purpose.
company.public_mission: GGI Solutions builds smart digital systems that help organizations understand people, guide growth, improve follow-up, and move people toward their next best step.
core_phrases: There is purpose in your pain
Don't stop. Get it, get it

faith_foundation.guide: The Bible is the guide and Jesus' way of life shapes the company culture.
faith_foundation.expression: The company should live the values more than force beliefs in public language.

brand_design.design_direction: Simple, spacious, readable, premium, and interactive. The visitor should feel like GGI Solutions understands and cares about them.

core_strategy.simple_site_goal: Make people want to buy by letting them interact with the site, identify their need, and receive a helpful recommendation.
buyer_journey: Tell us what industry you are in
Get matched with the right solution
Request a quote or start a project
core_strategy.water_principle: Same system. Different language. Same heart.

industry_adaptation.principle: The system does not change. The wording changes to match the buyer's world.

launch_stack.business_operations: Google Workspace / Google Forms / Google Sheets / Google Drive / Google Calendar
launch_stack.analytics: Google Analytics and Google Search Console
launch_stack.decision: Use the current Next.js site in GitHub and deploy through Vercel. Use Hostinger for domain/DNS. Use Google for business operations. Do not rebuild the public website in Google AI Studio, Replit, Hostinger Builder, or Google Sites unless there is a specific business reason.

next_steps: Create or connect project inquiry form
Launch publicly and start taking inquiries

public_site_policy.reason: Visitors should not need an account to view services, use the qualifier, request a quote, or contact GGI Solutions.
public_site_policy.auth_policy: Auth is only for possible admin/internal dashboard later, not for the public buyer journey.

cash_engine.description: Quick-turnaround offers that generate revenue now and create relationships for larger systems work.

basic_websites.name: LaunchSite
basic_websites.positioning: A clean website or landing page built to help visitors understand and respond.

event_landing_pages.name: Event LaunchPage
event_landing_pages.positioning: A quick-turnaround landing page for events, registration, RSVP, and promotion.

smart_websites.name: LaunchSite Systems
smart_websites.description: Websites and landing pages that act as digital front doors and move visitors toward action.

custom_qualifiers.name: Custom Qualifiers
custom_qualifiers.positioning: Turn your website into a salesperson.
custom_qualifiers.description: Interactive website experiences that ask questions, recommend services, and pre-qualify leads.

messaging_worlds.name: Messaging World Builds
messaging_worlds.positioning: Private mobile-first messaging worlds that help organizations communicate, onboard, organize, and engage their people.
messaging_worlds.note: The niche is not Telegram only and not WhatsApp only. The niche is Messaging World Builds.

follow_up_systems.name: Follow-Up Systems
follow_up_systems.positioning: Stop letting people fall through the cracks.

system_builds.name: System Build
system_builds.description: A connected system with forms, follow-up, messaging, or simple dashboard workflows.

development_ecosystem.description: The long-term people-development ecosystem that moves people from identity to growth to future leadership.
development_ecosystem.big_idea: Know who you are. Grow through what shaped you. Build toward who you are becoming. Help others grow.

free_2_grow.positioning: Helping kids grow with confidence, character, purpose, and support.

purposepath_os.positioning: Discover your why. Understand your wiring. Grow through what tried to break you.
questions: Why am I wired this way?
What can I learn from it?
What is my next best step?
purposepath_os.guardrail: PurposePath is not therapy, diagnosis, or clinical treatment. It is a coaching, reflection, growth, mentoring, and development system.

growthpath_os.positioning: Turn scattered potential into clear growth paths.
growthpath_os.purpose: Turn identity and discovery into structured growth, support, and measurable progress.

leaderrise_os.purpose: Move people from personal growth into responsibility, service, future leadership, and multiplication.
leaderrise_os.sequence_rule: Identity first. Growth second. Leadership third.

human_wiring_database_thesis.vision: Build one of the largest structured databases on how people are wired, how they grow, what motivates them, what shapes them, and how different environments need to communicate with them.
human_wiring_database_thesis.public_language_guardrail: Do not publicly lead with 'we are building a massive database on people.' Publicly say GGI Solutions helps organizations understand people better, communicate clearly, and guide growth with the right next steps.
core_questions: What type of support do they need?
What kind of follow-up works best?
What next step fits their current stage?
How do they move from identity to growth to leadership?
ethical_guardrails: Do not claim clinical mental health authority
Do not sell personal data carelessly
Protect minors with extra care and adult consent
Use data to support growth, not label or limit people

planned: Google Form or public contact form lead capture
Google Apps Script automation from form to Sheet to Telegram

chatbot_and_notifications.chatbot_goal: A simple customer-service style chatbot that helps visitors understand services, choose the right path, and submit lead information.
chatbot_and_notifications.telegram_goal: Send Reno instant Telegram alerts when a qualified lead submits.
recommended_order: Front-end chat widget with preset responses
AI upgrade with Gemini or another model

google_apps_script_role.role: Automation glue, not the public website host.
google_apps_script_role.first_workflow: Google Form -> Google Sheet -> Apps Script -> Telegram alert + email confirmation

operating_rules: Launch first. Collect leads. Improve weekly.
Public visitors should never need to log in.
Do not overbuild before real demand.
Basic websites and event pages are allowed as quick-turnaround revenue services.
The website should be simple, interactive, and make people want to buy.
The system stays the same; the wording adapts to the industry.
People are the mission. Technology is the vehicle.
